title: Digna - Occupational Health Platform
problem: Employers struggle to manage employee health, sick leave, and workplace wellness programs effectively.
solution: Occupational health platform connecting employers with occupational health services, managing sick leave, and preventive health programs.
technology: SaaS platform, health assessments, case management
varden_fit: High — occupational health is significant B2B segment. Could integrate with Varden's clinic network for employer services.
notes: Occupational health B2B. High-value employer segment.
